events.name: New York Knicks at Charlotte Hornets

headlines.description: — Kon Knueppel scored 26 points and made six 3-pointers to become the youngest player in NBA history with 250 in a season, and the Charlotte Hornets snapped the New York Knicks' seven-game winning streak with a 114-103 victory Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kon Knueppel scores 26 as Hornets snap Knicks' 7-game win streak with 114-103 victory

headlines.description: — Jalen Duren had 30 points and 10 rebounds to lead the Detroit Pistons past the New Orleans Pelicans 129-108 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Duren's 30-point double-double leads Pistons past Pelicans 129-108
